title: Video Blending Matrix
description: Video Blending Matrix is a triple-bus analog crosspoint: six inputs and six outputs, normalled for both parallel broadcast mixing and reconfigurable feedback—built for bussed color mixing, distribution, and self-patched feedback topology without a tangle of individual mults and switches. Patch recipes and use cases: Manual. Jack map and data: Specs.

seo.title: Video Blending Matrix | LZX Industries
seo.description: Video Blending Matrix: 6×6 analog video crosspoint (LZX). Manual and Specs on lzxindustries.com.
